name: Old World Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour, sugar, cocoa, instant coffee, baking soda, and salt together in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add the shortening, 2/3 cup of the buttermilk, and vanilla. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Add the remaining 1/3 cup of buttermilk and eggs. Beat at medium speed for 2 more minutes.
4. Pour batter into two greased 8-inch round cake pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes or until cakes are done.
6. Cool in pans on racks for 10 minutes. Remove from pans and let cool completely.
7. Place one cake layer on serving plate. Spread with sweetened whipped cream.
8. Top with second cake layer. Frost cake with remaining sweetened whipped cream.
9. Refrigerate until serving time.
Sweetened Whipped Cream:
1. Chill mixing bowl and beaters.
2. In chilled bowl, combine cream, sugar, and vanilla.
3. Beat with electric mixer on high speed until soft peaks form and mixture is of a spreading consistency. Do not overbeat (if overbeaten, it will turn into butter).
